activities.summaryZh: 看见全球少年 AI 项目，与优秀同龄人快速建立连接。
activities.summaryEn: Discover youth AI projects and quickly connect with outstanding peers worldwide.

activities.summaryZh: 硬核个人赛，检验 AI4Science 与 AI+Math 能力。
activities.summaryEn: A rigorous individual challenge testing AI4Science and AI+Math capabilities.

activities.summaryZh: 跨文化协作，共同为真实问题寻求可落地的解法。
activities.summaryEn: Collaborate across cultures to seek practical solutions to real-world problems.

activities.titleZh: AI未来报告与少年智库圆桌
activities.titleEn: AI Future Report & Youth Think Tank Roundtable
activities.summaryZh: 不仅写代码，也要讨论 AI 与未来文明。
activities.summaryEn: Beyond coding, students also discuss AI and future civilization.

activities.summaryZh: 集中展示成果，颁发个人与团队奖项。
activities.summaryEn: Showcase outcomes and present individual and team awards.

tracks.summaryZh: PRD 当前版本为峰会统一报名，不要求选手在表单中选择赛道。
tracks.summaryEn: The current PRD uses one unified summit registration and does not ask participants to select a track.
